t_ch: 哎，直接交给大守护者是不可能的。但是将民众的科研成果交给相关职能部门来审阅一下，倒还是符合流程的。
t_en: *sigh* It's impossible to hand it over directly to the Supreme Guardian. But handing over public research results for auditing by the appropriate authorities is well within the rules.

t_en: But I need some details about you. What school did you graduate from?

t_en: The sky is my alma mater...

t_en: The earth is my classroom...

t_en: In your case, as a researcher with no formal education, we also need you to answer a question to prove that your thesis is worthy of the Ministry of Education regulators' time.

t_ch: 请不必紧张，这是一个基础问题。

t_ch: 请听题：质数和自然数哪个比较多？
t_en: Here it is. Which are there more of: Prime numbers, or natural numbers?

t_ch: 质数。
t_en: Prime numbers.

t_en: I see... I thought as much... Come back when you can actually answer this question, and after that, you can show me your masterpiece. Don't even bother complaining, since I don't make the rules. If I make an exception for you, I'm the one getting punished.

t_en: Natural numbers.

t_en: I see... I thought as much... Come back when you can actually answer this question, and after that, you can show me your masterpiece. Don't even bother complaining, since I don't make the rules. If I make an exception for you, I'm the one getting punished.

t_ch: 一样多。
t_en: Both have the same amount.

t_ch: …竟然答对了。好吧，我会向教育部申请受理你这份论文的，请你回去等消息吧。有消息了会通知你的。
t_en: ...That's right. Very well, I'll apply to the Ministry of Education to accept your thesis then. Run along then, and wait for my news. We'll notify you when ready.

t_ch: 啥是质数啊？
t_en: What are prime numbers?

t_ch: 哎…果然。请回吧，等你能答出这个问题，再来提交你的大作吧。你也不要怪我，这都是规章制度，要是破例给你放进去，我是要吃处分的。抱歉了。

t_en: They're gate-keeping me with a stupid riddle.

t_en: You've been blocked, too? That's alright, and it's not your fault. Those bureaucrats have so little respect for the sciences.

t_en: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

t_en: Are they harassing you, too? Now you know how frustrating things usually are for me!

t_en: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

t_en: Wait a minute... did you just say that they posed you a question? Quick — hit me with it.

t_ch: 把曼娅出的题目复述给了雷金……
t_en: Tell Regin about Manya's question...

t_ch: 什么，就这？！就这破题你居然答不上来？
t_en: What? Is that it!? You can't even answer this basic question?

t_ch: 「一样多」，答案是「一样多」！早知道你这么没常识，我就……
t_en: "The same"! They're the same! If I knew you lacked such basic knowledge from the start, why I'd...

t_ch: 都说了你该自己去…
t_en: Told you that you should've gone yourself...

t_ch: …咳，这事儿能怪我吗？要不是因为我跟他们结了梁子——
t_en: ...Ahem, can you blame me for that? If it weren't for my relationship with them...

t_ch: 我是故意选错的！
t_en: I meant to pick the wrong answer!

t_ch: 啊对对对，你说的都对——
t_en: Ah, yes yes yes. You're correct—

t_ch: 不行，这口气我可咽不下！去，你现在就给我回去，把正确答案告诉那个出题的！直接拍他脸上！
t_en: Nope, I can't keep schtum any longer: Go back! You go back — right now — and tell them the correct answer! Right in their face!

t_ch: 我真是吃饱了撑的…
t_en: I really put my foot in it...

t_ch: 我有拒绝的权利…
t_en: I have the right to say no...

t_ch: 哎哟，别磨蹭了！你每在这儿多待一秒，他们怀疑你作弊的可能性就大一分……
t_en: C'mon, quit dawdling! Every second you stay here, the more they'll suspect you of cheating...

t_ch: 为了「大宇宙时间隧道」学说着想，你就再替我跑一趟吧！
t_en: For the sake of the big universe time tunnel theory, please help me do it once more!

t_ch: 关于论文…
t_en: About this thesis...

t_ch: 哎，原来是那档子事…到底什么时候能有消息啊…上回那个政务部的不是说，会帮我们递交申请吗？这么久了还没个回信，怕不是又要石沉大海了。
t_en: Oh, you mean that paper we handed over to the Administrative Department earlier. Haven't heard a thing from them. Didn't they promise they were gonna process the submission request for us? Or did they completely forget about this again?

t_ch: 是帮「你」递交。
t_en: Submit the paper for "you," you mean.

t_ch: 嗐，你的、我的、我们的，不都一样吗？
t_en: Come on, we work as a team, don't we?

t_ch: 我可没参与这论文…
t_en: Don't drag me into this. I had nothing to do with your paper.

t_ch: 嗯？什么意思？你要是不满意，我给你挂个名！
t_en: Hmmm? What do you mean? If you want some credit, I can list you as a co-author.

t_ch: 别，千万别，求你。
t_en: Please, don't. I beg of you.

t_ch: 事到如今你都上了贼船了，还在腼腆什么？况且和我这样的大科学家一起同…那个词叫同什么来着？
t_en: No need to be shy about it. We now sink or swim together. Besides, with a great scientific mind such as mine, shouldn't you feel honored that we are now together in the same b—... b—... What is the word? Ugh, it's just on the tip of my tongue.

t_ch: 同流合污？
t_en: You mean balderdash, as in "complete and utter balderdash"?

t_ch: 什么乱七八糟的！是「同舟共济」！和我这样的大科学家同舟共济，你应该觉得光荣才对。
t_en: No! I mean... The word is... um... The word is "boat"! You should feel honored that we are now in the same BOAT together!

t_ch: 同舟共济？
t_en: You mean we're in the same boat together?

t_ch: 啊对对对，就是这个！刚才我的脑子被大宇宙电磁波给干扰了，一下没想起来……
t_en: Ah yes — that's the one! My brainwaves were momentarily interrupted by high cosmic radiation levels, rendering my memory sluggish...

t_ch: 不说这些废话了。你快帮我去找她问问，申请进度怎么样了啊？什么时候才能有下文啊？
t_en: Enough chitchat. Help me find the person who is in charge of the submission process and ask when I can expect an outcome.

t_ch: 哎，这篇论文如果能发表，「大宇宙时间隧道」能为人所知，明明是整个贝洛伯格的福气…可除了你我，却没有半个人认真对待这件事。
t_en: If I can just get this paper out, then my big universe time tunnel theory will become common knowledge for the glorious prestige of all Belobog... But unfortunately, you and I are the only ones taking this seriously.

t_ch: 哦，原来是你啊——真巧，我正打算去找你呢。教育部已经对你的申请做出了反馈，他们派这位先生来问你几个问题。
t_en: Oh, it's you. You're here right on time. I was just setting off to look for you. The Ministry of Education has some feedback for you, and they sent this chap to ask you a few questions.

t_ch: 还要答题？
t_en: More questions?

t_ch: 这些都是基本流程，也是为了避免无意义的资源浪费。请您多多包涵。
t_en: This is just standard procedure to avoid pointless waste of resources. Please bear with me a moment.

t_ch: 也请您相信，这些问题都是非常简单的。如果您有能力完成科学论文，那就一定能轻松答出我出的题目。
t_en: Please also trust me when I say that these questions are very easy. If you have the skills to complete a scientific thesis, then you should be able to handle a few simple questions from me.

t_ch: 那么，这里有两道题需要您回答。
t_en: Well then, there're two questions here for you to answer.

t_en: You're a sight for sore eyes. It's been ages. Has the Ministry of Education sent anything? Go on, help me find out.

t_en: Greetings, {M#young man}{F#young lady}. You've already passed two rounds of testing. Now you have the chance to personally hand me your thesis.

t_en: However, there's one last hurdle that stands before you.

t_ch: 我将会提出两个问题，而你必须全部答对。
t_en: I will ask you two questions, both of which must be answered correctly.

t_en: These questions will be very challenging and you'll need... wisdom to go with your general knowledge. Have you prepared yourself?

t_ch: 我不想再答题了！

t_en: Hahaha, don't be like that. The fact I'm even meeting with you means that I'm interested in your prowess.

t_ch: 既然做好准备了，那就开始答题吧。
t_en: If you're ready, then let's begin.

t_en: The first question is...

t_ch: 原来是真实事件改编的…

t_ch: 好家伙，您这上下段还连着…

t_ch: 那当然，我们教育部推出应用题的大原则就是扎根生活、接地气。
t_en: Of course, the general principles of our Ministry of Education's application questions are grounded in real life.

t_ch: …怎么样，题面听懂了吧？说吧，偷走莱姆士汀家车轮的人是谁？
t_en: ...Hmmm? Did you get all of that? Come on then, who stole the wheel at the Limesteins'?

t_ch: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
t_en: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

t_ch: 如果你有这个意向，我随时可以给你安排学校。我还是很欣赏你的。
t_en: I can arrange some lessons for you any time, should you have the inclination. I quite admire you.

t_ch: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。

t_ch: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
t_en: Until we meet again, youngster.

t_ch: 请您慢走。
t_en: So long.

t_ch: 埃里克。
t_en: Eric.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈，你竟然答对了！
t_en: Hahaha, that's correct!

t_ch: 窃贼到底为什么只偷一个轮子？
t_en: Why on earth did the thief only grab one wheel?

t_ch: 因为这样才能尽可能多地让车辆瘫痪。犯人是不满他们豪车列队上街的暴发户行为……
t_en: Because that's the best way to cripple as many vehicles as possible. These crooks are angry about all the nouveau riche prancing around in their fancy lux cars...

t_ch: 嗐，我跟你说这个干嘛…总之，既然你证明了自己，那么我也愿赌服输——把你的论文交给我看看吧！
t_en: Ha! But why am I telling you all this... In any case, since you've proven yourself, I'm willing to take a gamble. Let me take a look at that paper of yours!

t_ch: 我看看…这…这是…「大宇宙时间隧道」？这……
t_en: Let me see... Is... Is this the big universe time tunnel theory? That's...

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，原来如此。
t_en: Hahaha, I see.

t_ch: 我就知道是那个家伙！
t_en: I knew it was that guy!

t_ch: 你就知道？
t_en: You knew?

t_ch: 那个家伙？
t_en: That guy?

t_ch: 我就知道，你这样能答对这么多题目的人，不会是那种赶都赶不走的…科研爱好者。
t_en: I knew that a person like you who can answer questions correctly would be different from those other pesky... science enthusiasts.

t_ch: 我就知道又是雷金这个家伙，和他的「大宇宙时间隧道」。
t_en: I knew that it was Regin again with his big universe time tunnel theory.

t_ch: 教育部认真审阅过这篇…论文。必须得承认，这篇论文是我见过文笔最好的梦话。
t_en: The Ministry of Education has carefully reviewed this... thesis. I have to admit, this thesis is the most profound nonsense I've ever seen.

t_ch: 当然了，看在他满腔热情的份上，教育部也提出，愿意为他报名一些入门级别的科学课程…但这被他视为一种羞辱。
t_en: But on the other hand, seeing how he was brimming with so much enthusiasm, the Ministry of Education offered to pull together some entry-level science courses for him, which he took as an insult.

t_ch: …我们实在没办法，就只能由着他每隔几个月就来闹一次了。
t_en: We really have no other choice other than to let him come back every other month for another go.

t_ch: 自从把他拉入黑名单后，他倒是消停了几个月。没想到他竟然还会雇人来…哎，你能答对这么多难题，显然不是等闲之辈，何必帮他做这些事啊……
t_en: He's been inactive the past few months since his ban. I never expected him to hire someone else... *sigh* You're good enough to answer all of these questions. Why'd you help him do all this...

t_ch: 对不起…
t_en: Sorry...

t_ch: …他给的实在是太多了。
t_en: ...He gave way too much.

t_ch: 无妨，虽然这件事没能让我们收获一篇划时代的科学论文，但让我认识了一位绝顶聪明的青年。
t_en: It doesn't matter. It may not have been any quantum leap in scientific research, but I still got to meet an extremely smart kid.

t_ch: 至少对我个人而言，这不算亏本买卖。
t_en: So for me at least, this encounter doesn't count as a loss.

t_ch: 这样吧，年轻人。你回去告诉雷金，教育部已经受理了论文，但是对于「大宇宙时间隧道」这样重要的研究成果，兹事体大，至少需要几个月才能回复。
t_en: So be it, kid. You go back and tell Regin that the Ministry has accepted the thesis, but a topic as important as the big universe time tunnel theory requires a few months before any replies can be made.

t_ch: 哎，这样应该能让他消停一段时间吧。
t_en: Ah, that should put him off for a while.

t_ch: 而我这位新朋友也能得到应得的酬劳。
t_en: And that way, this youngster here can also get {M#his}{F#her} well-deserved rewards.

t_ch: 那我公务在身，就先行告退了。年轻人，我们有缘再见。
t_en: I've got some duties to carry out, so I'll bid my farewell now. Youngster, I hope we are destined to meet again.

t_ch: 杰帕德
t_en: Gepard.
Uhh...

t_ch: 呃…不是我说你，都知道这是真实事件改编了…那你自己觉得这答案能对吗？
t_en: Uh... wait, you knew it was based on real events... and you still think that's the right answer?

t_ch: 嗐，算了算了…看来你也只能到此为止了啊！
t_en: Ah, forget about it... Looks like this is as far as you come, then!

t_ch: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
t_en: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

t_ch: 如果你有这个意向，我随时可以给你安排学校。我还是很欣赏你的。
t_en: I can arrange some lessons for you any time, should you have the inclination. I quite admire you.

t_ch: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。
t_en: You're so smart. With a little training, you'll definitely be able to answer these questions and then turn in that paper to me.

t_ch: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
t_en: Until we meet again, youngster.

t_ch: 请您慢走。
t_en: So long.

t_ch: 行了，听见波瓦大臣说的话了吧？你快走吧。
t_en: Alright. Did you hear what Minister Bova said? Move on, then.

t_ch: 不过…你确实蛮聪明的，下次再来挑战吧。…不不不，你还是别来了，怪麻烦的。
t_en: But... you really are quite smart. Let's give it another try next time. No... no no, actually don't come back. It's too much hassle.

t_ch: 哦…是这事儿啊，怎么样？论文成功递交上去了吗？教育部受理了吗？
t_en: Oh yes... that's right. And what of it? Has the paper been submitted yet? What did the Ministry say?

t_ch: 教育部的领导说…
t_en: The leaders at the Ministry of Education said...

t_ch: 他们怎么说？
t_en: What'd they say?

t_ch: 你的论文兹事体大…
t_en: Your thesis made me realize...

t_ch: 什么芝士劈叉？什么乱七八糟的？
t_en: "Real lies"? What are you harping on about?

t_ch: 是「兹事体大」！
t_en: No, it made me "realize"...!

t_ch: 哦哦，知识挺大！就这还领导呢？说的都什么语法？
t_en: Oh, oh... "real eyes"! That makes sense I suppose...

t_ch: 不过他们这次倒是识货，我这个论文确实「知识挺大」！
t_en: Because these guys know their stuff! They must have "real eyes" to recognize my visionary thesis!

t_ch: 总之需要几个月来审稿…
t_en: So there's a review process that takes months...

t_ch: …希望你能耐心等候。
t_en: ...Hope you can exercise some patience.

t_ch: 耐心等候？亏他们说得出口！
t_en: Patience? You dare talk to me about patience?

t_ch: 哪次让我吃闭门羹，都是这个托词……
t_en: Every time I'm left out in the cold, they always give the same excuse...

t_ch: 但这次是直接交给教育部的大臣了，也许情况会有所不同……
t_en: But maybe things will be different this time because it's been handed over directly to the Minister of Education.

t_ch: 哎，没办法，该等还得等。
t_en: Ah well, we'll just have to wait and see.

t_ch: 不管怎么说…嗯…谢谢你。
t_en: In any case... thank you.

t_ch: 已经有很多年，没人为了我的事四处奔走了。我这人说话比较冲，但我是真挺感谢你的…虽然你脑子不太好用。
t_en: It's been years since anyone cared about my thesis. I know I come across as blunt, but I really am grateful to you... even if you're not very smart.

t_ch: 你脑子才不好用呢。
t_en: You said yourself, you're the blunt one!

t_ch: 好好好，就你聪明。
t_en: Haha, that's clever.

t_ch: 开个玩笑而已，别生气嘛。既然你帮我做了这么多事，那这次就算我雷金错了！是我不好，对不起！
t_en: We're just kidding around, so don't get mad. You've done so much for me, and this time it's my bad! Y'hear me? I'm sorry!

t_ch: 收下这些吧，这是你应得的。我要去…「耐心等待」了。往好处想，也许在这期间我还能研究出什么新的科学理论呢！
t_en: Take these, and you deserve them. I'm going to go and "exercise some patience" then. Looking on the bright side, maybe I can put this time into working on a new scientific theory!

t_ch: 哦…是这事儿啊，怎么样？论文成功递交上去了吗？
t_en: Oh yes... that's right. And what of it? Has the paper been submitted yet?

t_ch: 对不起…
t_en: Sorry...

t_ch: 哎，明明闯过了第一关，真是功亏一篑。没事，这不怪你。是那群官僚太不尊重科学了。
t_en: Tsk, I already made it through their first hoop, only to fall at the final hurdle like this. That's alright, and it's not your fault. Those bureaucrats have so little respect for the sciences.

t_ch: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
t_en: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

t_ch: 题目怎么会这么难…
t_en: Why is the question so hard...

t_ch: 你这是遇见波瓦大臣了吧？我跟你说，最坏的就是这个糟老头子。
t_en: Did you run into Minister Bova? I'm telling ya, this old codger's the meanest of the lot.

t_ch: 别人出的题，难归难，好歹也就在数学题的范围内。这老头给你出脑筋急转弯！这种题目，对于我这样耿直的科学家来说，简直就是羞辱！
t_en: Sure, others might hurl out difficult questions, but at least they're always within the realm of math. This old man gives you mind-bending riddles! For a forthright academic like me, it's frankly humiliating!

t_ch: 现在你也遇到了波瓦大臣，败给了他的那些鬼题…这下你知道我平时有多憋屈了吧！
t_en: You've met the inscrutable Minister Bova now and his cryptic questions — so now you know how frustrating things usually are for me!

t_ch: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
t_en: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

t_ch: …啊？你在说什么？
t_en: Huh? What are you talking about?

t_ch: 之前那题的答案是「一样多」。
t_en: The answer to that question was "the same."

t_ch: 题？什么题……
t_en: Question? Which question...

t_ch: 哦，我想起来了！之前我不是都把你打发走了吗？怎么又跑来胡搅蛮缠……
t_en: Ah, now I remember! Didn't I send you packing last time? What are you doing back here bugging me again?

t_ch: …求你了，再帮我一回。
t_en: ...Please, help me out one last time.

t_ch: …科学家的任务罢了。
t_en: ...That's what a real scientist would do.

t_ch: 唉…碰上死缠烂打的家伙可真让人头疼。行吧，就通融你一次——前提是你真能答对。
t_en: This guy's a real stalker and a pain in the behind. Alright then, I'll bend the rules for you just this once — but you have to guess it right, okay?

t_ch: 让我看看…质数和自然数哪个比较多…是这道题对吧？正确答案是…咳，稍等……
t_en: Let me see then... prime numbers or natural ones, which are there more of... This is the first question, right? The right answer is... ahem, hang on a sec...

t_ch: …「一样多」。唔，居然真答对了……
t_en: ..."The same." Well, how 'bout that, you're correct.

t_ch: 好吧，既然都答应你了，我也不能反悔…我会向教育部申请受理你这份论文的，请你回去等消息吧。有消息了会通知你的。
t_en: Okay, I can't just go back on a promise that I've made, can I? So I'll apply to the Ministry of Education with your thesis then. Run along then, and wait for my news. We'll notify you when ready.

t_ch: 「一样多」。
t_en: "The same."

t_ch: 我来追问论文申请的进度。
t_en: I'm here to ask about that thesis paper.

t_ch: 「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」。
t_en: "Fourteen."

t_ch: 哦…是这事儿啊，怎么样？论文成功递交上去了吗？
t_en: Oh yes... that's right. And what of it? Has the paper been submitted yet?

t_ch: 对不起…
t_en: Sorry...

t_ch: 哎，明明闯过了之前两关…真是功亏一篑。没事，这不怪你。是那群官僚太不尊重科学了。
t_en: Tsk, I already made it through their first two hoops, only to fall at the final hurdle like this. That's alright, and it's not your fault. Those bureaucrats have so little respect for the sciences.

t_ch: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
t_en: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

t_ch: 题目比预想中要难…
t_en: This is harder than I thought...

t_ch: 这下你知道我平时有多憋屈了吧！
t_en: Now you know how frustrating things usually are for me!

t_ch: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
t_en: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

t_ch: 那什么，他们出了一道难题来刁难你，是吧？快给我讲讲，说不定我能帮你解开……
t_en: What is it? They asked you a difficult question, right? C'mon, spill it. Maybe I can help you get to the bottom of it...

t_ch: 把曼娅出的题目复述给了雷金……
t_en: Tell Regin about Manya's question...

t_ch: …不是，这也能答错？答案这么明显，简直呼之欲出啊！
t_en: ...No, you got that one wrong? But it's so blindingly obvious!

t_ch: 算了算了，不跟你置气了——毕竟「非科学家」的知识水平有限，我不该抱多大幻想……
t_en: Ah, forget about it. I ain't mad at you. I should have no illusions about the limited intellect of "non-scientists"...

t_ch: 这题的答案是「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」。时间还没过多久，那个出题的家伙应该还没跑远吧……
t_en: The answer for this question is "fourteen." It hasn't been long since you left, so that guy can't have gotten too far...

t_ch: 请解释一下你的解题思路…
t_en: Please explain how you arrived at your solution...

t_ch: 不行，没时间解释了！快，你赶紧回去，把正确答案告诉那个出题的家伙！
t_en: No, there's no time to explain! Hurry, go back and tell that examiner the correct answer to the question!

t_ch: 我怎么能变得和你一样聪明？
t_en: How can I become as clever as you?

t_ch: 没有捷径！想拥有科学家的智慧，就得通过艰苦的、漫长的专业训练……
t_en: There's no shortcut! If it's scientific wisdom you're after, you'll have to undergo a long and hard journey of professional training...

t_ch: 不对，没空说这些了！快，你赶紧回去，把正确答案告诉那个出题的家伙！
t_en: No, there's no time for this chitter-chatter! Hurry, go back and tell that examiner the correct answer to the question!

t_ch: 只隔了这么点时间，他应该还没跑吧？赶紧动用你的三寸不烂之舌，一定要让他通过我的论文申请！我的前途可就托付给你了！
t_en: It's still early, and he can't have gotten far. Quick, go put that gilded tongue of yours into action and get him to pass my paper! My fate is in your hands now!

t_ch: 记住，那道题的答案是「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」！
t_en: Remember: The answer to the question is "fourteen"!

t_ch: 咦？这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}不是刚刚才来咨询过论文的事宜吗？怎么突然又……
t_en: Huh? Didn't this {F#lady}{M#gentleman} just come in to inquire about their thesis? Why then all of a sudden...

t_ch: 再给我一次机会！
t_en: Give me one more chance!

t_ch: 这…我怕这样会影响到流程的公正性。不过嘛……
t_en: I... I'm afraid this will impact the fairness of our process. However...

t_ch: 我刚才只是装傻罢了。
t_en: I was just acting stupid then.

t_ch: 哈哈，您这句话我每天都要听上好几遍。毕竟大部分人考试发挥失常的时候，都觉得问题不出在自己身上。不过嘛……
t_en: Hahaha, now that's a sentence I have to put up with daily — and often. Most students underperforming in examinations fail to place the blame on themselves. And yet...

t_ch: 鉴于这是您第一次参与高强度的答题，有紧张情绪也是可以理解的。今天我就破例再给您一次机会吧。
t_en: It's understandable that you're a little nervous, given this is your first time taking part in a high-intensity quiz like this. I'll make an exception for you today and give you another chance.

t_ch: 请再听一次题面：莱姆士汀家有一个大停车……
t_en: Listen once more to the question: The Limesteins own a large parking lot...

t_ch: 「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」。
t_en: "Fourteen."

t_ch: 呃…您好歹听我把题面念完好不好？
t_en: Um... could you please let me read out the question in its entirety?

t_ch: …咳，算了，让我看看答案……
t_en: ...Ahem, fine, let me see your answer...
"Option three."

t_ch: 哈哈，您别太心急了，我可没保证这次的题目会和之前一样啊。
t_en: Haha, don't be so impatient. I can't guarantee that the questions this time are exactly the same.

t_ch: 我看看…等等，不对啊——这道题的答案怎么也是「选项3」？这是什么破题库啊？！
t_en: Let me see... Wait, that's not right. How come the answer is still "option three"? What does our quiz pool look like?

t_ch: 咳咳…您运气真好，居然能通过这次测验。不过论文申请还有很多后续流程要走，请您耐心等消息吧。
t_en: Ahem... You're lucky indeed to pass this quiz. In any case, there are still a lot of follow-up procedures to go through with your paper. Please be patient and await our notification.

t_ch: …这题到底是谁出的？我要去跟波瓦大臣告状！
t_en: ...Who came up with this question? I'm going to have a word with Minister Bova about all this!

t_ch: 我想再看一次题面…
t_en: Let me see the question again...

t_ch: 话说回来，我还是有点好奇——那个波瓦大臣出了什么题刁难你？快，给我讲讲……
t_en: Having said that, I'm still curious — what was the question that Bova stumped you with? Come on, and tell me...

t_ch: 把波瓦大臣出的题目复述给了雷金……
t_en: Describe to Regin the question posed by Minister Bova...
Hmm...

t_ch: 这家伙…出的题确实有点水平！虽然还是属于脑筋急转弯的范畴…不过这两道题，我一时还真想不出答案。
t_en: This guy! Now that's a thorny question! It's a real mind-bender... I can't think up answers for these two questions yet.

t_ch: 唉，就这样吧！看来这个世界还没有准备好接受「大宇宙时间隧道」这种超前的理论。
t_en: Ah, so be it! It seems like the world's not quite ready for a theory as mighty as my big universe time tunnel theory.

t_ch: 虽然结果是一场空，但是不管怎么说…嗯…还是得谢谢你。
t_en: Even though it came to nothing, it doesn't matter... I still have to give you my thanks.

t_ch: 已经有很多年，没人为了我的事四处奔走了。我这人说话比较冲，但我是真挺感谢你的。
t_en: It's been years since anyone cared about my thesis. I know I come across as blunt, but I really am grateful to you.

t_ch: 谁知道呢，说不定论文被拒收也是件好事…搞不准我还能研究出什么新的科学理论呢！
t_en: Who knows, perhaps it's best that my thesis is rejected... maybe I can come up with some new scientific theories!

t_ch: …收下这些吧！这是你帮我跑腿应得的。
t_en: ...Please, take this! You deserve it, for helping me with everything.

t_ch: …我来看看你最近在忙什么。
t_en: ...Let me see what you've been up to lately.

t_ch: 我？最近？哈，还能忙什么——当然是在进一步巩固、论证我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论了！
t_en: Me? Up to? Ha, well what else — naturally I've been consolidating and fine-tuning my big universe time tunnel theory.

t_ch: 话说回来，你听说了吗？整个贝洛伯格科学界都在疯传——教育部那个最难搞的波瓦大臣好像准备退休了！
t_en: Speaking of which, have you heard? The entire Belobog scientific community is going crazy with gossip... Because apparently the crankiest, oldest codger of them all — Minister Bova — is retiring!

t_ch: 疯传？
t_en: Gossip?

t_ch: 不然呢？你以为是这我随口瞎编的？
t_en: What else? Do you think I just made it up?

t_ch: …所以呢？
t_en: ...So what?

t_ch: 所以？你还没明白吗？这就等于在说——属于我，雷金的时代就要到来了！
t_en: So what? Don't you get it? This is the equivalent of saying: My time has come! The time of Regin is now!

t_ch: 等到波瓦老头退休，我马上就去敲教育部的门，让他们把「大宇宙时间隧道」编入贝洛伯格学院的科学教材！
t_en: Once Bova retires, I'll knock right on the door of the Ministry of Education and ask them to add my theory of big universe time tunnel into the science textbooks of Belobog!

t_ch: …咳，刚才太激动了，希望没吓着你。话说回来，既然你都来了，那我想请你再帮个忙……
t_en: ...Ahem, I got a little bit excited there. I hope I didn't freak you out. Getting back on track and seeing as you're all here, I'd like to ask another quick favor...

t_ch: 我想让你再去敲打一下教育部的那群喽啰，看看他们的智库里还藏着什么稀奇古怪的题目。怎么样，这事你能搞定吗？
t_en: I'd like you to go chase up those boffins at the Ministry of Education and see if they have any other weird content inside their archives. How about it, can you help me out?

t_ch: 听着挺有趣的。
t_en: Sounds pretty interesting.

t_ch: 哈，我就知道能指望你，靠谱！
t_en: Ha, I knew I could count on you as always!

t_ch: 我的时间非常值钱…
t_en: My time is very valuable...

t_ch: 别别别，你别走啊，我就只能指望你了！谁叫你跟那些庸俗的「非科学家」不一样呢！
t_en: D—D—Don't go! You're all I got! You're just so different from those barbaric "non-scientists"!

t_ch: 我以未来首席大科学家的名声担保，绝对不让你白跑这一趟。快去吧，我一边琢磨新理论一边等你的好消息。
t_en: With my reputation on the line as the future Chief Scientist, I won't let your labors be in vain. Go, now — I'll wait for your good news while I keep on pondering new theories.

t_ch: 哎呀，是您——经过上次的会面，波瓦大臣对您赞赏有加，还评价您是贝洛伯格学术界冉冉升起的新星。
t_en: Oops, it's you. Minister Bova has been singing your praises since last time, calling you a rising star in the Belobog academic circle.

t_ch: 您今天特地前来，是有什么事务需要教育部协助吗？
t_en: For what purpose have you come today? What task requires the support of the Ministry of Education?

t_ch: 考我。
t_en: Test me.

t_ch: 听说波瓦大臣要退休了？
t_en: I heard Minister Bova is thinking about retiring soon?

t_ch: 咦？您是从哪里得到的消息？我完全没听说……
t_en: Hmm? Where'd you hear that? I haven't heard anything...

t_ch: 咳，抱歉，请允许我回避您的这次提问。请问您还有别的事吗？
t_en: Ahem, sorry. Please allow me to sidestep this question of yours. Is there anything else I can do for you?

t_ch: 我想接受测验。
t_en: Yeah. I wanna take the quiz.

t_ch: 那我当然不能让您失望。正好，我这边准备了一些进阶的测验题目，您要不要试试？
t_en: Then I absolutely cannot let you down. I just so happen to have some advanced quiz questions right here with me. Would you like to give them a try?

t_ch: 事先提醒您，这些题目的难度可不低…答不上来也不丢人哦。不多说了，看题面吧。
t_en: I would like to remind you in advance that these questions are far from simple... and it's no shame to get them wrong. Onto the quiz, then.

t_ch: 如何，您知道答案了吗？霍华德、菲利普和乔伊斯当中，到底谁是骗子呢？

t_ch: 霍华德。
t_en: Howard.

t_ch: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
t_en: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

t_ch: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
t_en: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

t_ch: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！

t_en: How about this, then: I've been thinking about maybe changing careers and becoming an Expert Quizmaster. After all, I recently came to realize that I'm rather good at these.

t_ch: 教育部官员
t_en: Ministry of Education Officer

t_ch: 塞琳最近的烦恼…
t_en: Celine's recent troubles...

t_ch: 小女子还是比较满意现状的，为塔米拉小姐配音，做塔米拉小姐的影子，这有什么不好呢？
t_en: I'm happy with my lot at the moment, dubbing voices for Tamila and being her shadow. What's wrong with that?

t_ch: 不过呀…我有时也禁不住会想，如果能像塔米拉小姐一样，站在聚光灯之下…那该有多美妙……
t_en: But yeah... I can't help thinking sometimes how wonderful it must be to stand in that spotlight like Tamila... how wonderful it must feel...

t_ch: 所以小女子一直注视着舞台上闪闪发光的塔米拉小姐，像一个画家临摹名画一样，试着去临摹塔米拉小姐的一切……
t_en: So I've been watching Tamila's sparkling on-stage performances, like a painter copying a famous painting, trying to copy everything Tamila does...

t_ch: 可是呀~即使我已经能模仿塔米拉小姐的一切了，却还是缺少那关键的灵魂……
t_en: But! Even though I can perfectly emulate all of Tamila's behaviors, I'm still lacking that key piece of her soul...

t_ch: 灵魂？
t_en: Soul?

t_ch: 没错，灵魂…小女子觉得自己的临摹已经非常完美了，可她一颦一笑之中蕴含的气场，小女子却怎么也学不来……
t_en: Yeah, soul... my mimicry's already pretty much perfect, but the presence and gravitas contained in all those micro-expressions is something I haven't been able to master...

t_ch: 小女子意识到，任何人只要勤加练习，都能临摹她的肉体…但想要真正地成为塔米拉小姐，还需临摹她的灵魂。
t_en: I know that anyone can just copy her body as long as you practice hard enough... but I'll need to copy her soul if I want to truly become Tamila.

t_ch: 你可以帮帮我吗？
t_en: Can you help me?

t_ch: 夺人灵魂的法术是禁术…
t_en: Stealing souls is black magic, and forbidden...

t_ch: 讨厌啦~怎么把小女子说得像巫婆似的。
t_en: Oh dear. No! I'm not a witch. Why would you say it like that?

t_ch: 该怎么帮助你呢？
t_en: How can I help you?

t_ch: 嗯…放心好了，不会是什么很困难的工作哦~
t_en: Well... don't worry. It's not a difficult job~

t_ch: 我义不容辞！
t_en: Then I will do my best!

t_ch: 你能这么说，小女子太开心了。谢谢你~
t_en: Ah, that makes me so happy! Thank you~

t_ch: 小女子希望，你能去探访一下塔米拉小姐常去的店。偷偷问问店员，舞台之下的塔米拉小姐有什么喜好。
t_en: I would like you to visit the store where Tamila often goes and ask the staff in secret what Tamila's likes and hobbies are beyond the limelight.

t_ch: 也许了解了这些喜好，小女子就能了解塔米拉小姐的灵魂了。
t_en: Perhaps if I can learn what those are, then I can understand a bit more about Tamila's soul.

t_ch: 这样一来，小女子，就可以像塔米拉小姐一样，在舞台上熠熠生辉。
t_en: And with that, I'll be able to be like Tamila and shine brightly onstage.

t_ch: 你不能自己去吗？
t_en: Can't you just go yourself?

t_ch: 小女子是出于自己的崇拜之情才去研究她的，要是被店员认了出来，那该多尴尬呀~
t_en: I'm just studying to be like her because she's my idol. It'll be super awkward if any of the staff catches me~

t_ch: 我直接问问她好了。
t_en: Why don't I just ask her directly?

t_ch: 你别直接去啊…你要是这么唐突地跑去问塔米拉小姐，她那么聪明，肯定立刻就能猜到是小女子了吧…哎~小女子对她的热情，可是一股秘而不宣的烈火呢~
t_en: No, don't... she's a smart lady. If you ask her so suddenly and directly, she'll definitely know what I'm up to... *sigh* My passion is a fire that has to burn in secret~

t_ch: 我该去哪里帮你问呢？
t_en: Where should I go for you?

t_ch: 先去花店问问吧~小女子听说，塔米拉小姐每周都要买几束鲜花，装点自己的房间…哎，真是风雅啊。
t_en: Go to the florist first~ I heard Tamila buys a few bouquets of flowers every week for her room... *sigh* how elegant~!

t_ch: 花店的店员一定知道，她最喜欢买什么花~就拜托你去问问咯~
t_en: The florist definitely knows the kind of flowers that she likes~ Please, find out for me~

t_ch: 关于塔米拉…
t_en: About Tamila...

t_ch: 你说那位歌剧演员吗？
t_en: You mean the musical actress?

t_ch: 她的话，每次都会买同样的花…让我确认一下……「七彩虹」。塔米拉小姐每次买的花是七彩虹。
t_en: She always buys the same flowers every time... Let me see... "Rainbows." Every time Tamila comes, she buys Rainbow flowers.

t_ch: 哎，塔米拉小姐这个人，和我有点话不投机…我们对小说的品味不太一致，之前聊了两句，算是不欢而散吧。
t_en: *sigh* Tamila and I had a bit of a communication mismatch... We don't have the same taste in novels. We've talked a few times before, but we didn't part on the best terms.

t_ch: 但她每周都会来买好几十束七彩虹，算是我们店的大客户了，所以…咳，客户永远都是对的！
t_en: But every week she'll be in here buying a few dozen bouquets of Rainbow flowers. She's a big repeat customer for our store, so... the customer's always right!

t_ch: 转达瓦丝卡的话…
t_en: Relaying Vaska's reply...

t_ch: 七彩虹…有意思~像塔米拉小姐这样闪耀的人，所钟情的花竟然是…「平凡的美好」。
t_en: Rainbows... interesting~ For someone as glorious as Tamila, her floral preference is so... "ordinarily beautiful."

t_ch: 小女子以为她所钟爱的一定是名贵的花卉，因此来衬托她高贵的本质…原来如此，原来她的灵魂有着这样的渴望……
t_en: I thought that she'd definitely buy some precious rare flowers instead, to match her noble self... But actually, there is this craving and desire in her soul...

t_ch: 谢谢你，小女子距离她的灵魂更近了。收下这些谢礼吧。
t_en: Thank you! I feel a little bit closer to her soul, now. Please, take this as a thank-you.

t_ch: 最近还顺利吗…
t_en: Everything going well?

t_ch: 是你呀~最近其实还挺顺利的~自从你为小女子带来了塔米拉小姐的珍贵情报，小女子感觉…已经离她越来越近了……
t_en: Yeah~ Actually it's been going really well~ Since you gave me that precious intel about Tamila, I felt... closer and closer to her...

t_ch: 小女子开始感到，她朦胧的背影在眼前逐渐清晰……
t_en: I'm starting to feel the mystery surrounding her is gradually becoming clearer to me...

t_ch: 不过…只靠这些显然还不够……我记得，上次那位瓦丝卡小姐说，塔米拉和她对小说的品味不一致…那么也许，也许她喜欢什么样的小说，也能够展现出她的部分灵魂。
t_en: But... it's obviously not enough... I remember Miss Vaska was saying that Tamila and her have different tastes in novels... then, maybe her taste in fiction can showcase a little more of her soul?

t_ch: 这样吧，请你再帮小女子一个忙…帮小女子去行政区的书摊问问，塔米拉小姐有没有什么特别喜欢的书籍……
t_en: Can you help me out with one more favor? Go to the bookstore over in the Administrative District and ask if Tamila has any favorite books...

t_ch: 拜托你啦~
t_en: Please~

t_ch: 关于塔米拉…
t_en: About Tamila...

t_ch: 塔米拉小姐？是那位歌剧演员吗？
t_en: Tamila? You mean the musical actress?

t_ch: 不好意思，我对歌剧不太熟悉，不太认识什么明星。不过，我对她印象倒是蛮深刻的……
t_en: Sorry, I'm not into musicals and don't know any celebs. However, she certainly made an impression on me...

t_ch: 之前有一段时间，她总来问我，有没有和《歌德宾馆的夜与雾》类似的小说。
t_en: Some time back, she kept coming over to ask if there was any novel similar to Evening Ember at the Goethe Hotel.

t_ch: 为了给她推荐书籍，我还特地去看了一下这本书…是一本爱情小说的残卷，并不完整。
t_en: I even read this book so I could make some suggestions for her... It's an excerpt from an unfinished romance novel.

t_ch: 她说自己特别喜欢这本书，原话我还记得……「在温暖的卧室中伴着花香反复阅读这本书，真是太幸福了。」
t_en: She said that she loves this book, and I still remember how she said it. "It's such a blessing to read this book over and over again in a cozy warm bedroom with my flowers."

t_ch: 不过很可惜，我又给她推荐了几本类似的书，她好像都不太满意。
t_en: Unfortunately, the few books I recommended to her, she doesn't seem to be satisfied with them.

t_ch: 但这也是常有的事…人总会在某个时刻遭遇到一本无可替代的书，有时候这和那本书无关，只关乎这位读者的心境。
t_en: But that's pretty common... At some point, everyone finds that one book that is irreplaceable. Sometimes it has nothing to do with the book, but rather the reader's state of mind.

t_ch: 没别的事的话，我要继续看书了。再见。
t_en: If there's nothing else, I'll get back to my book. See you later.

t_ch: 转达菲丝的话…
t_en: Relay Fizz's reply...

t_ch: 塔米拉小姐会喜欢一本爱情小说，这倒是不意外……
t_en: It's no surprise that Tamila would love a romance novel...

t_ch: 但这本小说，小女子还没有读过。你的情报非常有用，谢谢你~
t_en: But I've never read this particular one. Your intel is highly useful. Thank you~
